content: Growth Escalators is a performance marketing agency in Jaipur. Backend repo: growth-escalators-backend-v2. Stack: Node.js, Express, TypeScript, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL on Railway. 44 database tables, 39 tests passing. Two Railway services: web and GE-Worker. ClickUp team ID 9016403868 always queried at team level.

Team: Vishal Malakar (Meta Ads Manager), Nimisha Daiya (Graphic Designer), Keshav Vaishnav (Video Editor and office anchor). Sakcham is Sales lead — must never see ops processes, scoring logic, or automation internals. Sanskriti removed from all active systems. Never send anything to #sales-bd channel.

SEO clients: aarohaom.com (GA4: 506144010), blackpandaenterprises.com (GA4: 513868257), ageddentistry.org (GA4: 514956819). All use WordPress with Rank Math SEO. GSC uses sc-domain: prefix. White-label outreach targeting UK, AU, CA agencies at 900 USD per month. Paraiso is founding client for D2C Growth OS.
